description_long: This object consists of two large, cubic storage boxes with a weathered, light brown surface that resembles aged plywood or particle board. Each box has a simple, utilitarian design with clean, straight edges and flat faces, giving them a sturdy and industrial appearance. Both boxes feature small, rectangular warning labels with yellow caution symbols on their front faces, suggesting they may be used for storing sensitive or hazardous materials. The surfaces are matte and slightly rough, with visible stains and scuff marks that indicate frequent handling or exposure to outdoor elements. There are no visible handles, locks, or hinges, and the lids appear to be flat and possibly removable. The boxes are likely intended for placement on the ground in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites.
description: Two large, weathered cubic storage boxes with matte, light brown surfaces and caution labels on the front. The boxes have a utilitarian, industrial look and show signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing both boxes with visible caution labels and the flat, slightly stained surfaces.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side and top surfaces, with one box partially obscuring the other and only one label visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, unmarked backs of both boxes with no visible labels or features.
description_view_3: Side-rear view displaying the plain sides and tops, with no labels or distinguishing marks visible.
